title: Fix off-by-one in date range filter (#142)
body:
## What

The date range filter excluded the final day of the selected range, so a report for "June 1 - June 30" silently dropped June 30.

Fixes #142

## Why

`isInRange` compared with `<` where the spec (and the UI copy) treat the end date as inclusive. Switched to `<=` and normalized the end date to 23:59:59.999 before comparing.

## How I checked it

- Added a regression case in `test/date-range.test.js` that fails on `main` and passes here
- `npm test` passes locally on Node 20.11
- Manually walked through the exact report from #142 before and after the change
